description_long: This rifle features a long, robust barrel with a prominent muzzle brake at the front, designed to reduce recoil and muzzle rise. The body is primarily matte black with metallic gray accents, and it includes a large, cylindrical scope mounted on top for precision aiming. The stock is fixed and rectangular, providing stability for the shooter, while the pistol grip and trigger assembly are positioned below the main receiver. A detachable box magazine is visible beneath the receiver, suggesting a high-capacity, rapid-reload capability. The overall construction appears to be primarily metal, with some polymer components for the grip and stock. The rifle's design is tactical and modern, suitable for urban environments where precision and power are required.
description: A modern, tactical rifle with a long barrel, large scope, fixed stock, and detachable box magazine, finished in matte black and metallic gray.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the rifle, including the scope, fixed stock, pistol grip, and muzzle brake.
description_view_1: Front-on view highlighting the circular muzzle brake and the alignment of the scope above the barrel.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the scope, fixed stock, magazine, and the detailed muzzle brake.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the stock and the back of the scope, with the barrel extending forward.
